---
title: "SARIMA_load_forecast"
author: "Faith Lucy Kirabo"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

# Import libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(forecast)
library(lubridate)
```

### Load training data
```{r}
train <- read.csv("~/Desktop/MSADS Courses/Time Series/Final_Project/data/ercot_train_2018_2023.csv")
head(train)
```

### Load validation data
```{r}
validate <- read.csv("~/Desktop/MSADS Courses/Time Series/Final_Project/data/ercot_validate_2024.csv")
head(validate)
```

### Load testing data (predicted weather forecasts 2025)
```{r}
test <- read.csv("~/Desktop/MSADS Courses/Time Series/Final_Project/data/test_ercot_weather_forecasts_2025.csv")
head(test)
```

### Load Actual 2025 data (measure overall prediction performance)
```{r}
actual_2025 <- read.csv("~/Desktop/MSADS Courses/Time Series/Final_Project/data/ercot_test_2025.csv")
head(actual_2025)
```

```{r}
train$datetime    <- ymd_hms(train$datetime)
```

```{r}
validate$datetime <- ymd_hms(validate$datetime)
```

```{r}
test$datetime     <- ymd_hms(test$datetime)
```

```{r}
actual_2025$datetime   <- ymd_hms(actual_2025$datetime)
```

```{r}
# xreg features (external weather regressors, calendar effects)
xreg_cols <- c(
  # weather drivers
  paste0(c("COAST","EAST","FWEST","NCENT","NORTH","SCENT","SOUTH","WEST"), "_temperature_f"),
  paste0(c("COAST","EAST","FWEST","NCENT","NORTH","SCENT","SOUTH","WEST"), "_wind_speed_mph"),
  paste0(c("COAST","EAST","FWEST","NCENT","NORTH","SCENT","SOUTH","WEST"), "_solar_radiation_wm2"),
  # calendar effects
  "is_weekend", "is_holiday",
  # cyclical encodings (captures smooth annual + daily seasonality)
  "hour_sin", "hour_cos", "month_sin", "month_cos", "dow_sin", "dow_cos","temp_lag_24h")

# keep cols present in all datasets
xreg_cols <- xreg_cols[xreg_cols %in% names(train) &
                        xreg_cols %in% names(validate) &
                        xreg_cols %in% names(test)]

# xreg matrix, drop rows with NA
make_xreg <- function(df, cols) {
  df %>%
    select(all_of(cols)) %>%
    as.matrix()
}

cat("Final xreg cols:", length(xreg_cols), "\n")
print(xreg_cols)

train_clean <- train %>% drop_na(temp_lag_24h)

# build matrices
xreg_train    <- make_xreg(train_clean,    xreg_cols)
xreg_validate <- make_xreg(validate, xreg_cols)
xreg_test     <- make_xreg(test,     xreg_cols)
```

```{r}
cat("NAs in xreg_train:", sum(is.na(xreg_train)), "\n")
cat("xreg rows:", nrow(xreg_train), "| train rows:", nrow(train), "\n")
cat("Matrix rank:", qr(xreg_train)$rank, "| ncol:", ncol(xreg_train), "\n")

y_test <- ts(train[["COAST_load_mw"]], frequency = 24)
cat("NAs in COAST load:", sum(is.na(y_test)), "\n")
cat("Length:", length(y_test), "\n")

cat("temp_lag_24h NAs before imputation:", sum(is.na(train$temp_lag_24h)), "\n")
cat("temp_lag_24h NAs in xreg_train:", sum(is.na(xreg_train[,"temp_lag_24h"])), "\n")
```


```{r}
# load targets
load_cols <- c("COAST_load_mw", "EAST_load_mw", "FWEST_load_mw", "NORTH_load_mw",
               "NCENT_load_mw", "SOUTH_load_mw", "SCENT_load_mw", "WEST_load_mw")
```


```{r}
cat("y_train length (COAST):", length(ts(train[["COAST_load_mw"]][-(1:24)], frequency = 24)), "\n")
cat("xreg_train rows:", nrow(xreg_train), "\n")
cat("xreg_validate rows:", nrow(xreg_validate), "| NAs:", sum(is.na(xreg_validate)), "\n")
cat("xreg_test rows:", nrow(xreg_test), "| NAs:", sum(is.na(xreg_test)), "\n")
cat("validate rows:", nrow(validate), "\n")
cat("test rows:", nrow(test), "\n")
cat("actual_2025 rows:", nrow(actual_2025), "\n")
cat("load_cols:", paste(load_cols, collapse = ", "), "\n")
```


### SARIMA Model
```{r}
start_time <- Sys.time()
results  <- list()
metrics  <- list()

for (col in load_cols) {
  zone_start <- Sys.time()
  cat("\n[", format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S"), "] Fitting:", col, "\n")
  
  # Target series as ts object with frequency = 24 (hourly, daily seasonality)
  y_train <- ts(train[[col]][-(1:24)], frequency = 24)
  
  # auto.arima selects best ARIMA orders by AICc
  # xreg passes weather + calendar features as external regressors
  # stepwise + approximation = faster search, acceptable for large hourly series
  fit <- auto.arima(
    y_train,
    xreg        = xreg_train,
    seasonal    = FALSE,
    stepwise    = TRUE,
    approximation = TRUE,
    max.p = 3,
    max.q = 3
  )
  
  # 2024 validation — computed fresh per zone
  fc_validate <- forecast(fit, xreg = xreg_validate, h = nrow(validate))
  val_pred    <- as.numeric(fc_validate$mean)
  val_actual  <- validate[[col]]
  
  metrics[[col]] <- tibble(
    zone   = col,
    period = "2024_validation",
    MAE    = round(mean(abs(val_pred - val_actual), na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    RMSE   = round(sqrt(mean((val_pred - val_actual)^2, na.rm = TRUE)), 1),
    MAPE   = round(mean(abs((val_pred - val_actual) / val_actual) * 100, na.rm = TRUE), 2)
  )
  
  # 2025 forecast — stored per zone
  fc_2025      <- forecast(fit, xreg = xreg_test, h = nrow(test))
  test_pred    <- as.numeric(fc_2025$mean)
  test_actual  <- actual_2025[[col]]
  
  results[[col]] <- tibble(
    zone      = col,
    period    = "2025_test",
    MAE       = round(mean(abs(test_pred - test_actual), na.rm = TRUE), 1),
    RMSE      = round(sqrt(mean((test_pred - test_actual)^2, na.rm = TRUE)), 1),
    MAPE      = round(mean(abs((test_pred - test_actual) / test_actual) * 100, na.rm = TRUE), 2)
  )
  
}
cat("\nTotal time:", round(difftime(Sys.time(), start_time, units = "mins"), 1), "mins\n")
```

### Forecast 2025
```{r}
summary(fc_2025)
```

```{r}
# Validation 2024 metrics
metrics_df <- bind_rows(metrics)
cat("\n2024 Metrics by Zone\n")
print(metrics_df)
cat("\n2024 Aggregate\n")
metrics_df %>%
  summarise(MAE = round(mean(MAE),1), RMSE = round(mean(RMSE),1), MAPE = round(mean(MAPE),2)) %>%
  print()
```

### Test Combined Model Performance (Weather Forecast Model + Load Forecast SARIMA Model)
```{r}
# 2025 metrics
results_df <- bind_rows(results)
cat("\n2025 Metrics by Zone\n")
print(results_df)
cat("\n2025 Aggregate\n")
results_df %>%
  summarise(MAE = round(mean(MAE),1), RMSE = round(mean(RMSE),1), MAPE = round(mean(MAPE),2)) %>%
  print()
```
